title: Energy from Europe for Europe – Hydrogen as a key enabler [Promoted Content]
summary_full: Europe stands at a crossroads: without clear rules and decisive investments, a competitive hydrogen economy may slip away. The European Resilience Alliance sets a pragmatic course, showing why stability, simplification, and strategic energy choices - made now - define Europe’s future.
